## Summary
- [ ] Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Phase 1 Gate Checklist (required)
- [ ] `npm run release:preflight` passes locally.
- [ ] CI check `Phase 1 Baseline / Phase 1 Baseline Check` is green.
- [ ] No direct push to `main`/`dev`; this PR targets `dev` from `feature/*`.
- [ ] Environment changes (if any) are reflected in `docs/environment-matrix.md`.
- [ ] If adding/changing secrets, no secret values are committed and owner handoff notes are included.

## Evidence
- [ ] Paste preflight command output snippet or link to CI run.
- [ ] Note any risk/rollback considerations.

## Reviewer Notes
- [ ] Call out follow-up tasks or known limitations.
